Package org.praxisplatform.uischema.command

package org.praxisplatform.uischema.command
Host-neutral contracts for governed resource command execution.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.praxisplatform.uischema
    Núcleo do Praxis Metadata Starter com enums, propriedades e contratos que descrevem o vocabulário x-ui compartilhado entre backend e frontend.
  • Class
    Description
    GovernedResourceCommandExecutor
    Executes resource commands through a host-provided private boundary while keeping the public Praxis lifecycle stable and sanitized.
    ResourceCommandErrorCategory
    Public error vocabulary for governed resource command execution.
    ResourceCommandEvidenceSanitizer
    Removes private host details from command evidence before it becomes observable.
    ResourceCommandExecutionException
    Exception used by host providers to return a public, governed command failure.
    ResourceCommandExecutionProvider
    Host-neutral SPI for executing resource commands behind a private backend boundary.
    ResourceCommandExecutionRequest
    Public command execution envelope understood by Praxis and implemented by a host provider.
    ResourceCommandExecutionResult
    Public, sanitized result of a governed resource command execution.
    ResourceCommandHttpResponseAdapter
    Converts governed command outcomes into the canonical Praxis HTTP response envelope.
    ResourceCommandMessage
    Public message emitted by a governed resource command.
    ResourceCommandOutcome
    Stable public outcomes for a governed resource command.
    ResourceCommandResponsePolicy
    Public response policy requested for a governed resource command.
    ResourceCommandScope
    Scope where a resource command is executed.

Built with ❤️ for fast, consistent, contract‑driven backends. Learn more.
